chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C. P. No.S-464 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing / priority 1. For order on office objections No.1 to 4 a/w reply as at ‘A’. 2. For hearing of CMA No.4047/2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 02.06.2025 Mr. Jam Khizar Jan, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Ahmed Khan Khaskheli, AAG Sindh. Mr. Salman Ahmed, Advocate for Respondent No.6. Addl. SHO/SI Zulfiquar Maqbool of PS Napier. ------------------------------- Through the instant petition, the petitioner claims that the official respondents at the instance of his ex-wife are harassing him. On notices the police officials have turned up and filed replies wherein they have submitted that the ex-wife of the petitioner filed a complaint with the police station and notice to appear was issued to him and no harassment has been caused. It appears that there is dispute between the parties for the custody of the minor / ward, however, the police officials are directed to conduct themselves in accordance with law. So far as the custody of the minor is concerned, the petitioner may avail remedy before the Guardian Court in accordance with law. This petition stands disposed of accordingly alongwith listed application. J U D G E Asif
